known_backend_risk: Second-iteration pod testing reached Deeptools IFN but stock backend failed first on INPUT-primary, LX-pinning, legacy coreStateInit_, loop-order, and bundle datadsc assumptions.
one_neighbor_finding: Current IFN semantics remain a hard blocker for full SwiGLU when multiple neighbor inputs need handoff into one consumer.
why: This directory is the minimal unit-test fixture. The Deeptools-executed single-edge probe is recorded under artifacts/input_fetch_neighbor_real_mb_out_iter2.
